---
title: 'Are you looking to get money in, or your message out?'
date: '2016-05-16T05:47:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9005379300180440191'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/are-you-looking-to-get-money-in-or-your.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Revelation'
  - 'Word From God'
---

Kenneth Copeland writes that God told him "Too many churches are looking for ways to get money in, instead of looking for ways to get the Gospel out."<br />
<br />
The same could be said for businesses, bloggers, etc...<br />
<br />
Rather than plot and scheme about ways to "Make Money"...<br />
<br />
What if I just focused on the 1-3 things I KNOW I should be working on, and let God worry about how to fund me.<br />
<br />
Darrell<br />
<br />
<br />
